headline: Huge debt forces big food brand into bankruptcy liquidation

headline: Vanguard’s VCR ETF Carries 40% Amazon and Tesla Exposure Dressed as Consumer Discretionary
summary: Vanguard Consumer Discretionary ETF (NYSEARCA:VCR) is down nearly 9% year-to-date, but the story behind that number matters more than the number itself. This fund carries the “consumer discretionary” label, yet nearly 40% of its portfolio sits in just two stocks that behave more like technology bets than traditional retail plays. headline: Hedge fund veteran Guy Spier shutters Aquamarine Fund as stockpicking edge erodes
summary: Investing.com -- Guy Spier, the prominent Zurich-based value investor and longtime disciple of Warren Buffett, is returning capital to investors in his $470 million Aquamarine Fund, citing both personal health challenges and a fundamental shift in the viability of active management.

headline: Amazon AI Chip Exits Test Trainium Ambitions And AWS Growth Story
summary: Several senior leaders from Amazon's Annapurna Labs AI chip unit, including a key figure behind the Trainium processor, have recently left the company. The exits affect the group that designs custom AI chips used to power Amazon Web Services data centers. These departures follow prior leadership turnover in Amazon's AI division and come during a period of heavy investment in AI infrastructure. For investors watching Amazon.com, NasdaqGS:AMZN, the latest leadership changes land at a time...
